selections.name: Siena Belle
selections.reason: Vekoma filly debuting for George Weaver with sharp Saratoga workouts; looks primed for a big debut.

selections.name: Great Destiny
selections.reason: Only runner in the field with race experience, finishing a solid 3rd here on June 17 with a 95 speed figure.

selections.name: Maxie's Munny
selections.reason: Maxfield filly debuting for Daniel Eubanks; shows a steady string of works at Laurel Park.

selections.name: Bourbon N Music
selections.reason: Debuts for Anthony Pecoraro with Carol Cedeno aboard; pedigree suggests early speed.

danger_horse.name: Sweet Bourbon Tea
danger_horse.reason: Has three starts under her belt and gets a jockey change to Raul E. Mena; could sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: No No Milo
selections.reason: St Patrick's Day gelding debuting for Edward Allard; training exceptionally well at Delaware Park.

selections.name: Nazeer
selections.reason: Happy Saver colt debuting for Gregory Sacco; bullet work on June 25 indicates high readiness.

selections.name: Sound Check
selections.reason: Speaker's Corner colt debuting for Michael Gorham; has shown solid gate speed in morning trials.

selections.name: Tatters
selections.reason: Girvin colt debuting for Michael Matz; steady work tab at Fair Hill suggests stamina.

danger_horse.name: Brisk Alley
danger_horse.reason: Only horse with racing experience; pressed the pace and weakened on July 8, should improve second out.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-7, Trifecta 1,7 / 1,3,6,7 / ALL

selections.name: Verdant Tones
selections.reason: Tonalist filly ran a massive 98 speed figure when 2nd on turf at Laurel Park on June 21; clear class of the field.

selections.name: Crab Mentality
selections.reason: Draws in from the AE list; possesses high tactical turf speed (103 rating) and drops from MCL35000.

selections.name: Tiz Complex
selections.reason: Consistent turf router who was 3rd in a tough MCL40000 at Monmouth last summer; fits well here.

selections.name: Aqua Blaze
selections.reason: Flameaway filly dropping from MSW/MCL at Aqueduct and Laurel Park; turf pedigree is strong.

danger_horse.name: Natures Fury
danger_horse.reason: Raging Bull filly finished 2nd on turf at Penn National last time; inside post is highly advantageous.

selections.name: The Wolfman
selections.reason: Extremely class-conforming veteran with 12 lifetime wins and a 98 speed rating; the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Speedy Alex
selections.reason: Won last out at Laurel Park in CLM7500 with a sharp 90 speed rating; has excellent tactical speed.

selections.name: Sassy Lad
selections.reason: Veteran campaigner who won two starts back at Penn National; possesses early speed to clear from post 7.

selections.name: Uniwinner
selections.reason: Consistent check earner who finished a solid 3rd at Delaware Park on July 4; minor award threat.

danger_horse.name: Rolly
danger_horse.reason: Finished 2nd here on May 21; has some late kick if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Fly Now
selections.reason: Dialed In gelding won impressively at Delaware Park on June 18 with a 105 speed rating; top choice.

selections.name: Rags to Lace
selections.reason: Consistent turf router with a 100 speed rating; gets a positive jockey switch to Jose Batista.

selections.name: Babble
selections.reason: Finished a competitive 4th in SOC16000 at Delaware Park on June 20; tactical speed is a plus.

selections.name: Wicked Boss
selections.reason: Consistent turf router for Madison Meyers; inside post allows for an easy ground-saving trip.

danger_horse.name: Brewmaster
danger_horse.reason: Finished 3rd behind a tough field at Laurel Park on June 26; can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Curlene's Spirit
selections.reason: Mor Spirit filly possesses high speed ratings (87/97) and drops from AOC50000 at Laurel Park; looks dominant.

selections.name: Take Charge Boo
selections.reason: Won last out at Delaware Park on June 20 in SOC16000; highly consistent and loves the track.

selections.name: Vanaka
selections.reason: Jamie Ness trained filly is extremely consistent; won two starts back at Delaware Park.

selections.name: Tasty Time
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind Take Charge Boo last time; possesses a solid late kick.

danger_horse.name: Rozzyroo
danger_horse.reason: Won two starts back at Philadelphia Park; has tactical speed to stay close.

selections.name: Citana (ARG)
selections.reason: H. Motion trained filly is the class of the field (107 speed rating); drops from tough Laurel stakes.

selections.name: Starship Athena
selections.reason: Michelle Nevin trained filly drops from Saratoga allowance; possesses a massive class advantage.

selections.name: Doesn'thurttoflirt
selections.reason: Michael Stidham trained mare won last out at Laurel Park; highly consistent turf router.

selections.name: Le Touche
selections.reason: Jose Gallegos trained mare is highly consistent on turf; finished 2nd at Monmouth last out.

danger_horse.name: Call Her Bluff
danger_horse.reason: Possesses high speed ratings (105) and drops from Aqueduct allowance; dangerous if she gets loose.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #11, Exacta Box 3-11, Trifecta 11 / 3,4 / ALL

selections.name: Braquet

selections.name: Skip Thru Da Fire
selections.reason: Jose Corrales trained veteran finished 3rd at Laurel Park last out; minor award threat.

danger_horse.name: C C Girl

selections.name: Leonids

selections.name: Laddie Dance

selections.name: Gentle Breeze
selections.reason: Bruce Kravets trained gelding finished a solid 3rd at Penn National last out; consistent check earner.
